sections.paragraph:
Original: חנס

Transliteration: chânês

Phonetic: khaw-nace'

BDB Definition:

Hanes = "grace has fled"
  1. a place in Egypt, site uncertain but may be either of the following
    1. Tahpanhes, a fortified town on the eastern frontier
    2. a place in lower Egypt, on an island in the Nile south of Memphis

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
